---
name: New check proposal
about: Propose a new Essential Eight check
labels: enhancement, new-check
---

**Check ID**
Proposed ID, e.g. E8-OM-009

**Strategy**
Which Essential Eight strategy does this check relate to?

**Description**
What does this check test?

**ISM Control(s)**
Which ISM control IDs does this check map to?

**Maturity Level**
ML1 / ML2 / ML3

**Platform(s)**
Windows / Linux / macOS / All

**Check implementation**
How should this check be implemented? (registry key, command, file, service, manual)

**Why is this check important?**
Brief justification.
